failedAssertions.reason: Required Heart Rate baseline band contract is unmet: missing heart_rate baseline data and observed chart fill opacity is 0.6 (not <=0.15).
Back navigation returned to Trend URL/date but did not preserve prior range/metric context (reset to 30D/Weekly).

Contract not met: with only 10 baseline-window points, API still returns populated baselines for night/recovery and still returns direction fields instead of suppressing baseline-driven fields entirely.
Cross assertion failed on frontend axis rendering despite correct API window bounds.
API overlap inclusion passes, but required left-edge marker rendering was not conclusively met in UI evidence.
Earliest-date boundary is not enforced: Previous-day button stayed enabled on old historical dates.
Mobile viewport still overflows horizontally (375px viewport rendered 478px document width).
Required multi-strip shared overnight axis (glucose + heart-rate + hypnogram) was not present on the rerun surface.
Hypnogram stage differentiation requirement not met on rerun.
Summary strip contract failed because Sleep Latency delta badge is absent.
S1 end-to-end causal visualization contract not satisfied in rerun.
Contract-required Body Temp Deviation panel was not rendered.
S3 fixture expectations are not met on the current local surface.
Correlation card and in-card Share action were absent in the tested Trend UI.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Unable to confirm the required job-completion path because baseline rows never materialized in metric_baselines after event submission; only on-demand baseline math could be validated.

Blocked: API-only flow cannot create an already-expired raw token in-session (expires_in_days minimum is 1, and expired-share listing/detail endpoints do not reveal raw token), so the required expired-token 403 check is not directly executable.
Blocked by runtime precondition: could not execute during an in-progress window for this environment's night-window calculation.

appliedUpdates.description: Added agent-browser guidance for trend chart date-click validation to prefer active data-point clicks when overlays intercept broad chart clicks.
